item.title: GR00T 1.7 just landed in LeRobot 🟢 We upgraded our @NVIDIARobotics GR00T integration to 1.7, the newest open generation of NVIDIA's cross-embodiment foundation model. It swaps the previous VLM for Cos
item.description: pGR00T 1.7 just landed in LeRobot 🟢br /br /We upgraded our a href="https://nitter.net/NVIDIARobotics" title="NVIDIA Robotics"@NVIDIARobotics/a GR00T integration to 1.7, the newest open generation of NVIDIA's cross-embodiment foundation model. It swaps the previous VLM for Cosmos-Reason2-2B feeding a
